subject: [PATCH 10/11] mm/zsmalloc: Handle single object charge migration in migrate_zspage

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch handles single object charge migration in the migrate_zspage function of zsmalloc. It addresses a scenario where compressed objects are migrated from one zspage to another, potentially spanning multiple nodes and pages. The patch calculates how much of each object lives on each page and performs up to 4 uncharge-charges to transfer lruvec and node statistics across affected nodes. This approach avoids enumerating all possible combinations of node migrations, simplifying the process and ensuring accurate accounting of memory usage.
